_comment: Thin Claude Code shim. Real enforcement lives in lefthook.yml + Makefile so the same rules apply to Codex CLI, pi, openclaw, hermes, etc. This file only adds edit-time feedback inside Claude Code by delegating to the same `make` targets.

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" vet >&2 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */README.md|README.md|*/docs/*.md|docs/*.md) make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" docs-check >&2 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */CLAUDE.md|CLAUDE.md|*/GEMINI.md|GEMINI.md) echo 'WARNING: edited a generated mirror — AGENTS.md is canonical.' >&2 ;; esac
